upstream: ViTPose-S whole-body (COCO-WholeBody, 133 keypoints), easy_ViTPose export path
output_shape_note: 133 = 17 body + 6 foot + 68 face + 42 hand. The 64x48 spatial size (input/4) is RECONSTRUCTED, not confirmed from salvage; verify against the exported graph and correct if it differs.
quantisation: compiler-default mixed (no forced bit width); LayerNorm-adjacent layers expected int16, rest int8. Not measured.
licence: Apache-2.0 (easy_ViTPose / ViTPose). The pretrained wholebody weights follow their own terms — check before redistribution.

toolchain.note: Convention for this repo; the shipped .hbm was produced with this line. The host HBDK and board HBRT must match. NOT independently re-confirmed for this recipe.

cosine.note: Standard gates (host .bc vs ONNX; board .hbm vs host .bc bit-identical; board .hbm vs ONNX end-to-end). These are the GATES to run, not measured results — no verification numbers survived in salvage. Compare heatmaps, not decoded keypoints.

task_metric.name: COCO-WholeBody keypoint AP (whole-body), top-down over ground-truth person boxes
task_metric.protocol: not defined in salvage; the natural check is AP on a WholeBody val subset with the same crop preprocessing as calib.py, plus per-keypoint heatmap-peak agreement vs the float ONNX.
task_metric.note: No task-metric numbers survived. Heatmap cosine is a useful fidelity signal but keypoint AP is the real acceptance for a pose model; declare and measure it on a rebuild.

measured.note: NONE of the on-board figures (latency, FPS, cosine-vs-fp32, hbm size) survived in salvage. The shipped file vitpose_s_wholebody_nashm_256x192.hbm exists on the board, but its measured numbers were not recorded here. Do not fabricate — measure on a rebuild.

reconstruction.export_py: RECONSTRUCTED. The original export from checkpoint to ONNX did not survive; only a downstream static-shape prep (vitpose_prep.py) and a float reference runner (vitpose_ref.py) did. export.py here rebuilds the missing step from the salvaged I/O contract plus the standard easy_ViTPose export path.
confirmed_from_salvage: preprocessing: pad box to 3:4, resize 192x256, /255, ImageNet z-score (mean 0.485/0.456/0.406, std 0.229/0.224/0.225), PAD_BBOX=10
config.yaml compiler settings (march nash-m, O2, latency, jobs 32)
reconstructed_or_uncertain: exact head variant (classic vs simple decoder)
